import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = words.len()
  if n == 0
    print("longest=")
    Ok(())
  else
    mut best = match words.get(0)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end
    mut best_len = string.len(best)
    mut i = 1
    while i < n
      let w = match words.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        ""
      end
      let wl = string.len(w)
      if wl > best_len
        best = w
        best_len = wl
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("longest=#{best}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
